action: Add exact post-application verification before treating a canonical queue proposal as adopted.

completed.verification: Six deterministic Node tests passed against byte-identical pre-commit files.

claim_states.observed: An executable verifier now binds proposal, reviewer binding, prior and resulting queue digests, manual commit identity, signature-verification status, committer allowlist, and verifier-artifact allowlist.
claim_states.inferred: The canonical state transition is trustworthy only as a complete before-intent-after evidence chain.
claim_states.proposed: Create an immutable real-world application packet from retained GitHub evidence and run this verifier after a human-approved queue update.
claim_states.superseded: CM-0018's proposed post-application verifier is implemented.
claim_states.unresolved: No real approved canonical queue mutation or cryptographically verified application packet exists.

privacy_boundary: Public repository state and abstract identities only; no private chat, health information, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads.
next_action: Build a packet assembler that verifies retained Git blob bytes and GitHub commit-verification metadata before invoking the post-application verifier.
